behavior_summary: Provides gameplay logic for a bag item: when a player 'looks' at the bag it emits a short description ('bag ') to the viewer; when a player 'uses' the bag the script checks an item status bit and opens or closes the bag UI (gump) accordingly.
BAG::look constructs a short literal message and delegates display to Item::bark so the viewing actor receives the description, then yields/suspends as typical for a U8P_BAG::look handler.

BAG::use obtains the bag's status word (Item::getStatus), tests bit 0x0100, and calls Item::openGump with argument 0x03 if set, otherwise calls Item::closeGump. This implements opening/closing the bag interface on use.
notable_control_flow: U8P_BAG::BAG::look: linear flow — build literal 'bag ' -> call Item::bark(viewer_pid, 'bag ') -> store return in a temp -> suspend.
U8P_BAG::BAG::use: conditional branch based on (Item::getStatus() & 0x0100) — true path calls Item::openGump(item, 0x03), false path calls Item::closeGump(item).
No global flags are modified by these handlers; behavior is localized to the item context and the viewer process.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the 0x03 argument passed to Item::openGump (likely a mode/page id) remains inferred, not explicit.
Precise calling convention/order of parameters for Item::* calls is inferred from push order; confirmation would require ABI documentation.
Whether the tested status bit 0x0100 represents 'closed' vs 'open' is inferred from the branch direction — the precise meaning of the bit is not documented here.

main_function.name: U8P_BAG::look
main_function.purpose: Respond to the 'U8P_BAG::look' (examine) event on a bag item by producing a short description ('bag ') directed to the viewing actor via Item::bark, then suspend; this is the item's presentation/inspect handler.
entry_conditions: Event 0 (U8P_BAG::look) — triggered when an actor inspects/examines the bag item (viewer PID passed in).

function_map.name: U8P_BAG::look
function_map.role: Handle the U8P_BAG::look/examine event: create and send short description ('bag ') to the viewer via Item::bark.

function_map.name: U8P_BAG::use
function_map.role: Handle the use/interact event: check item's status bit 0x0100 and open (openGump(0x03)) or close (closeGump) the bag UI accordingly.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item method used to display/send a short text message from the item to a process/player (used for the U8P_BAG::look description).

function_map.name: Item::getStatus
function_map.role: Engine/item method returning the item's status word/flags; used to test bit 0x0100 in BAG::use.

function_map.name: Item::openGump
function_map.role: Engine/item method to open the item's UI/gump (called with argument 0x03 here; likely a mode/page id).

function_map.name: Item::closeGump
function_map.role: Engine/item method to close the item's UI/gump.

external_calls.purpose: Deliver the short U8P_BAG::look-description string ('bag ') to the viewing actor/process so they see the item's short name/description.
Retrieve the bag's status flags/word to determine whether to open or close the gump (test bit 0x0100).
Open the bag UI/gump when the inspected status bit suggests the gump should be opened; passed argument 0x03 (likely a mode/page id).
Close the bag UI/gump when the inspected status bit suggests it should be closed.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides gameplay logic for a bag item: when a player 'looks' at the bag it emits a short description ('bag ') to the viewer; when a player 'uses' the bag the script checks an item status bit and opens or closes the bag UI (gump) accordingly.
